author: wholetomy
description: Creates directories and notes based on the day of the year.

manifest.author: Thomas Campanholi
manifest.description: Creates directories and notes based on the day of the year.
manifest.name: e-Daiary

name: e-Daiary

releases.author: wholetomy
releases.description:
In this version, it has been implemented two new funcionalities:
  1. Now when the note is created, it will have "Dia #X" added to it, so that way, you don't need to write that every day.
  2. The title of the directories and the notes were changed to "DD-MM-YYYY" format.

releases.author: wholetomy
releases.description:
This is the second version of this plugin. 
It has been implemented 3 new funcionalities:
1. Now it will open the last note created.
2. It will create the missed days recursively.
3. It's not possible anymore to select the folder ".obsidian" to save your notes in the "Options" menu.

releases.author: wholetomy
releases.description:
## v1.0.0
This is the first version of this plugin. 
It has basic functionalities, such as creating folders and markdown files where you specify in the 'Options' menu.
